title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 238.280 - Posting of increase in sales tax, when
text:
238.280.  Posting of increase in sales tax, when. — In each transportation development district in which a sales tax has been imposed or increased under section 238.235, every retailer shall prominently display the rate of the sales tax imposed or increased at the cash register area.
(L. 2007 S.B. 22 § 4)
